english: Fierce, heroic, great Vishnu, blazing, all-faced
roman: Ugram viram Maha Vishnum jvalantam sarvatom ukham

english: Narasimha the fearsome and auspicious, death to death — I bow
roman: Nrisimham bhishanam bhadram mrityum mrityum namamyaham

english: The god who gave boons to Prahlada and slew Hiranyakashipu
roman: Prahlada varadam devam Hiranya kashipu ghna kam

english: Who suddenly emerged from the pillar — I bow to Narasimha
O Lakshmi-Narasimha, Lord, I who have taken refuge
Protect me O dweller of the universe, protect me O supreme of the supreme

hindi: नृसिंहाष्टकमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेद् भक्तितः सदा।
english: Whoever reads this sacred Narasimha Ashtakam daily with devotion
roman: Nrisimha ashtakam idam punyam yah pathed bhaktitah sada

hindi: भयं नास्ति भवेत् तस्य नृसिंहस्य प्रसादतः॥
english: Has no fear, by the grace of Narasimha
roman: Bhayam nasti bhavet tasya Nrisimhasya prasadatah
